name: 网页版贪食蛇游戏
description: 用于验证 spec 驱动开发机制的贪食蛇游戏
phase_gate_note: 批准作为04首个正式实施对象，验证spec驱动开发机制

required_checks.name: 检查游戏文件是否存在
required_checks.command_bash: test -f features/snake-game/index.html && echo '✅ index.html exists' || echo '❌ index.html not found'

required_checks.name: 检查游戏文件不为空
required_checks.command_bash: test -s features/snake-game/index.html && echo '✅ index.html is not empty' || echo '❌ index.html is empty'

required_checks.name: 检查文件大小
required_checks.command_bash: SIZE=$(wc -c < features/snake-game/index.html); if [ $SIZE -gt 5000 ]; then echo "✅ File size: $SIZE bytes (reasonable)"; else echo "❌ File too small: $SIZE bytes"; fi

required_checks.name: 检查HTML基本结构
required_checks.command_bash: if grep -q '<!DOCTYPE html>' features/snake-game/index.html && grep -q '<canvas' features/snake-game/index.html && grep -q 'function gameLoop' features/snake-game/index.html; then echo '✅ HTML structure valid'; else echo '❌ HTML structure invalid'; fi

required_checks.name: 检查文档完整性
required_checks.description: 验证所有必需文档存在
required_checks.command_bash: MISSING=0; for file in spec.md design.md tasks.md verify.md goal.md plan.md steps.md acceptance.md README.md; do if [ ! -f "features/snake-game/$file" ]; then echo "❌ Missing: $file"; MISSING=1; fi; done; if [ $MISSING -eq 0 ]; then echo '✅ All required documents present'; fi
